title: Introduction
text:

See Knuth (1984) for additional discussion of literate programming.

title: Summary
text:
In summary, this book has no content whatsoever.

title: ThamesWater Andrio Emilio application
text:
Preface
Hi!
I’m Andrio, I received a pre-call screening for the performance and risk analyst role here at ThamesWater. I wanted to be proactive and have all my research, preparation and skills in this Quarto book to show my fit for the role. I want to show a balance between my skills so I have written the project to be candid and show my thought process between each chapter.

I hope whoever reads this enjoys (including myself)!
:)
